patterns.name: Probation extendable at sole discretion
phrase_examples: probation period may be extended at the sole discretion of the company
probation may be extended without notice
probation period subject to extension at our discretion

patterns.name: IP assignment covering unrelated inventions
phrase_examples: assigns all intellectual property whether related or unrelated to the role
all inventions conceived during or after employment
all works in perpetuity

patterns.name: Post-termination non-compete
phrase_examples: shall not engage in any business similar to or competitive with the company for 24 months following termination
non-compete period of two years post separation
restricted from working with any competitor

patterns.name: Leave / benefits subject to changing company policy
phrase_examples: leave as per company policy which may be revised from time to time
benefits subject to company policy in force
policies may be amended at any time

patterns.name: Employer termination without notice or cause
phrase_examples: company may terminate this agreement at any time without notice for any reason
termination at the sole discretion of the company
no notice period required for termination by the company

patterns.name: Employee notice-period forfeiture
phrase_examples: failure to serve notice will result in forfeiture of two months salary
salary deduction in lieu of notice period
buyout of notice period at three months pay

patterns.name: Stipend / salary revised at company will
phrase_examples: stipend amount may be revised by the company at any time without prior notice
compensation may be modified at our discretion
salary subject to adjustment without notice

patterns.name: Service bond / minimum tenure with penalty
phrase_examples: must serve a minimum of two years failing which liquidated damages of one lakh shall be payable
service bond of three years
early exit penalty

patterns.name: Exclusive jurisdiction outside employee's location
phrase_examples: exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Singapore
disputes shall be resolved exclusively in courts of
subject only to the jurisdiction of

patterns.name: Perpetual confidentiality without carve-outs
phrase_examples: confidentiality obligations survive termination in perpetuity
shall keep confidential indefinitely
no time limit on confidentiality

patterns.name: 'At-will' employment framing (foreign template)
phrase_examples: employment is at-will
this is an at will employment relationship

patterns.name: Consent inferred from continued use
phrase_examples: by using our services you consent to the collection
continued use constitutes acceptance
by accessing the site you are deemed to have agreed

patterns.name: Policy updated at any time without notice
phrase_examples: we may update this policy at any time without notice
we may modify this privacy policy at our discretion
amendments effective upon posting

patterns.name: Sharing with affiliates / third parties for business purposes
phrase_examples: we may share your information with affiliates and third-party service providers
data may be disclosed to advertising partners
share with business partners for marketing

patterns.name: Indefinite or 'as deemed necessary' retention
phrase_examples: we retain your personal data for as long as we deem necessary
data stored indefinitely
retention is at our discretion

patterns.name: Processing on 'legitimate business interest' (not a DPDP ground)
phrase_examples: we process data for our legitimate business interests
processing is necessary for legitimate interests
used for business purposes

patterns.name: Collection of device, location, contacts data
phrase_examples: we collect device identifiers and advertising IDs
we may access your contacts and call logs
precise location data is collected

patterns.name: Erasure subject to retention / internal policy
phrase_examples: you may request deletion of your data subject to our retention obligations
deletion at our discretion
erasure is subject to internal policies

patterns.name: Cross-border transfer without specifics
phrase_examples: data may be transferred outside India
stored on servers located in other jurisdictions
cross-border processing may occur

patterns.name: Generic 'contact us' instead of named grievance officer
phrase_examples: for any concerns contact us at support@
reach out to our team
if you have privacy questions contact support

patterns.name: Class action / jury trial waiver
phrase_examples: you waive any right to bring a class action
no jury trial
class arbitration is waived

patterns.name: Children's data without explicit parental consent
phrase_examples: if you are under 18 you should not use the service
data of minors is processed
users under 13 require parental consent (US-style)

patterns.name: Non-refundable under any circumstances
phrase_examples: all ticket sales are final and non-refundable under any circumstances
tickets are non-refundable
no refund whatsoever

patterns.name: Organiser may reschedule / cancel without refund
phrase_examples: the organiser reserves the right to reschedule cancel or relocate the event at its sole discretion without obligation to refund
venue may change without notice
we may postpone without refund

patterns.name: Non-transferable with cancellation penalty
phrase_examples: tickets are non-transferable
resale is strictly prohibited and may result in cancellation without refund
transfers will be cancelled without refund

patterns.name: Disputes locked to foreign jurisdiction
phrase_examples: all disputes shall be resolved exclusively in courts of Singapore
exclusive jurisdiction of London courts
claims may only be brought in Delaware

patterns.name: Organiser disclaims liability for injury / loss
phrase_examples: the organiser is not liable for any loss injury or damage suffered at the event
no liability for personal injury
we disclaim all liability for loss of belongings

patterns.name: Class action / jury waiver in ticket terms
phrase_examples: you waive any right to bring a class action
no jury trial
class arbitration waiver

patterns.name: Force majeure with no refund obligation
phrase_examples: in event of force majeure no refund shall be issued
we shall have no obligation to refund in case of acts of god
circumstances beyond our control - no refund

patterns.name: Terms may change without notice to ticket holder
phrase_examples: terms may be changed at any time
conditions amended without notice
we may update these terms

patterns.name: Admission refused at sole discretion without refund
phrase_examples: admission may be refused at our sole discretion without refund
entry may be revoked without refund
we reserve right to refuse entry

patterns.name: Non-refundable processing / convenience fees
phrase_examples: convenience fee is non-refundable
booking fee not refundable
service fees are not refundable under any circumstances

patterns.name: All sales final / no returns
phrase_examples: all sales are final
no returns or refunds
no refund policy applies

patterns.name: Terms modifiable by company at any time
phrase_examples: we may modify these terms at any time
agreement may be amended at our discretion
terms can change without notice

patterns.name: User-side indemnity for any claims
phrase_examples: you indemnify us for any claims arising
user shall indemnify and hold harmless the company
you agree to indemnify against all losses

patterns.name: Sold 'as is', no warranty of any kind
phrase_examples: service is provided as is without warranty of any kind
no warranty express or implied
no warranty of merchantability or fitness for purpose

patterns.name: Liability capped to a small recent payment
phrase_examples: our liability is limited to the amount paid in the last month
total liability capped at INR 1000
no liability beyond fees paid in the prior six months

patterns.name: Auto-renewal without explicit consent
phrase_examples: subscription will automatically renew unless cancelled in writing
we will continue to bill you until cancellation
auto-renew unless you opt out 30 days prior

patterns.name: Hidden / additional fees
phrase_examples: additional fees may apply
surcharge at our discretion
service fees may be added without notice

patterns.name: Mandatory arbitration in foreign seat
phrase_examples: all disputes resolved by binding arbitration with seat in Singapore
mandatory arbitration in London
arbitration administered under foreign rules

patterns.name: No warranty of results / outcomes
phrase_examples: we make no guarantee of any specific result
no warranty as to accuracy or availability
no assurance of outcomes

patterns.name: Refund only as store credit
phrase_examples: refunds will be issued only as store credit
refund processed as wallet credit
refunds in the form of a gift card
